page_content:
After you register... don’t forget!

View your book list on your Student Schedule at app.testudo.umd.edu/main/schedule.

Complete waitlist check-in at app.testudo.umd.edu/main/waitlistCheckin.

Review academic dates and deadlines at registrar.umd.edu/calendars and guidelines for adding and dropping classes at registrar.umd.edu/registration/register-classes/add-drop-classes.

Pay your bill and visit billpay.umd.edu to learn more about your student account

Review course-related policies at www.ugst.umd.edu/courserelatedpolicies.html and gradschool.umd.edu/faculty- and-staff/course-related-policies.
